news.title:
Indian Bank's Q4FY26 likely stable with healthy asset growth, stable asset quality.
Net interest margins may remain range-bound, some banks could see marginal sequential expansion.
news.summary:
Indian Bank's Q4FY26 likely stable with healthy asset growth, stable asset quality.

news.title:

IT sector shows limited downside; AI-driven opportunities ahead with caution on oil marketers.

news.title:
Indian Bank revises Treasury Bills Linked Lending Rates (TBLR) effective 03.04.2026.

news.title:
Indian Bank's deposits rose 13% YoY to Rs 8.30 lakh cr by Mar'26.
Standalone net profit jumped 7.3% to Rs 3,061.48 cr; shares fell 3.99%.
news.summary:
Indian Bank's deposits rose 13% YoY to Rs 8.30 lakh cr by Mar'26.
Standalone net profit jumped 7.3% to Rs 3,061.48 cr; shares fell 3.99%.

news.title:
Indian Bank's gross advances rose 13.6% YoY to ₹6.68T from ₹5.88T.
Total deposits increased 12.6% YoY to ₹8.30T from ₹7.37T.
news.summary:
Indian Bank's gross advances rose 13.6% YoY to ₹6.68T from ₹5.88T.
Total deposits increased 12.6% YoY to ₹8.30T from ₹7.37T.

The mid-cap lender outperformed the Public Sector Bank sector and Sensex.

news.title:
Indian Bank shifts from very expensive to expensive valuation, signaling changing market sentiment.
Evolving P/E and P/BV ratios prompt caution despite robust performance and strong market returns.

news.title:
Indian Bank and NaBFID plan to raise ₹80B via bonds by March.
The funds will be sourced from the corporate bond market, per bankers.
news.summary:
Indian Bank and NaBFID plan to raise ₹80B via bonds by March.

news.title:
Indian banks wrote off Rs 1.72 lakh crore loans in FY25, with retail loans at Rs 45,404 crore topping write-offs.
Retail loan share rose to 26.4% in FY25; recovery rates from write-offs improved to 34.8%, per Finance Ministry data.
news.summary:
Indian banks wrote off Rs 1.72 lakh crore loans in FY25, with retail loans at Rs 45,404 crore topping write-offs.
Retail loan share rose to 26.4% in FY25; recovery rates from write-offs improved to 34.8%, per Finance Ministry data.

news.title:
Indian Bank gets AAA Stable rating for Rs.5000 cr infra bonds from CARE and CRISIL.
Existing bonds and issuer ratings reaffirmed, showing strong credit profile and stable outlook.
news.summary:
Indian Bank gets AAA Stable rating for Rs.5000 cr infra bonds from CARE and CRISIL.
Existing bonds and issuer ratings reaffirmed, showing strong credit profile and stable outlook.

Only 3 of 30 listed universal banks had >1% net NPAs in Q3.

news.title:
Indian Bank-led consortium invites bids to sell ₹738.2 cr BLA Power bad loans.
The sale follows the Swiss challenge method with an anchor bid of ₹285 cr.

news.title:
PSU Bank stocks fell sharply after Budget 2026 due to record borrowing of ₹17.2 lakh crore by the government.
Bank of India, Indian Bank, Bank of Maharashtra, and Bank of Baroda lost 5-6% amid treasury loss concerns.
news.summary:
PSU Bank stocks fell sharply after Budget 2026 due to record borrowing of ₹17.2 lakh crore by the government.
Bank of India, Indian Bank, Bank of Maharashtra, and Bank of Baroda lost 5-6% amid treasury loss concerns.

news.title:
PSU bank shares, including Bank of India, Bank of Baroda, and Indian Bank, dropped after FM Nirmala Sitharaman proposed a banking review panel.
The panel aims to assess reforms for growth, financial stability, inclusion, and restructuring NBFCs like PFC and REC for efficiency.
news.summary:
PSU bank shares, including Bank of India, Bank of Baroda, and Indian Bank, dropped after FM Nirmala Sitharaman proposed a banking review panel.
The panel aims to assess reforms for growth, financial stability, inclusion, and restructuring NBFCs like PFC and REC for efficiency.
